insights.title: Death overs defined the tempo
insights.body: Kings XI Punjab scored at 8.2 runs per over in overs 16–20, 40% dots in that phase.

insights.title: Rajasthan Royals won this contest
insights.body: Deccan Chargers scored 214/5 and Rajasthan Royals replied with 217/7. YK Pathan was Player of the Match.

insights.title: Toss winner took the match
insights.body: Rajasthan Royals won the toss, chose to field, and won. Dataset average: toss winner wins ~51% of IPL games.
